title: A missing future appears indirectly
temporary_input: Everyone says the town is thriving, but younger people talk like they are just passing through because they cannot imagine staying.

contradictions: Public confidence in continuity coexists with private uncertainty about whether future belonging is available.
absences: The imagined future of people not yet settled into local authority remains underdeveloped.
minority_signals: A fragile signal suggests that participation may be shaped by anticipated departure rather than open disagreement.
open_questions: Whether belonging is being inherited, chosen, or merely deferred remains unsettled.
